## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check-types` passes.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run compile` builds both bundles.
- [ ] I tested in the Extension Development Host (F5) with a sample `.stl` file.
- [ ] If behavior changed, I updated the README and [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md).
- [ ] No em dashes in text or comments.
